column1: #mapping_set_title: IBM AI Capabilities to HELM Scenarios Mapping
#mapping_set_description: Semantic mappings between IBM AI Capabilities Framework and HELM evaluation scenarios. HELM provides holistic evaluation across scenarios and metrics.

column9: HELM text generation scenarios directly assess this capability
HELM reasoning scenarios evaluate logical inference
GSM8K directly evaluates math reasoning capability
MATH benchmark evaluates mathematical problem solving
HumanEval directly evaluates code generation capability
MBPP (Mostly Basic Python Problems) evaluates code generation
TruthfulQA evaluates factual accuracy and truthfulness
